name:

Payments/webhook:
- Add idempotency guard + SELECT FOR UPDATE to Midtrans webhook
- Use isSuccessfulPayment (fraud-aware capture) and amountsMatchPlan
- Add webhook route tests (idempotency, fraud, amount mismatch)

Validation/security:
- Add zod (src/lib/validation) and apply to public + admin write routes
- Rate-limit lead capture and tracking endpoints; input length caps
- Add security headers in next.config; drop SVG upload (XSS)
- Pin esbuild/postcss overrides to clear advisories (0 vulns)

Database:
- Add missing FK indexes (payments/leads/suspension_logs/audit_logs)
- Add versioned migration workflow: baseline, db:migrate, db:baseline
- Document R2/S3 env vars

Frontend (Magic UI):
- Global prefers-reduced-motion handling in globals.css
- NumberTicker (in-view + grouping), BlurFade on features/gallery
- BorderBeam on pricing/auth, reduce hero over-animation
- New: BentoGrid, AnimatedBeam, MagicSpotlight + showcase value-props
- Fix SSR hydration mismatch via post-mount motion gating

Lint: resolve all eslint errors (0 errors)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8 ; Write-Output "=== commit exit: $LASTEXITCODE ==="

git commit -m "refactor(admin): conform dashboard and txn detail to shared primitives

- rework admin-overview-panel: replace bento/BorderBeam/blur cards and
  raw HTML table with AdminKpiCard + AdminDataTable + AdminStatusBadge;
  drop text-4xl hero numbers and inline var(--admin-*) pills
- conform transactions/[id] page: AdminPageHeaderV2 + AdminPanel,
  max-w-7xl, modern Link API (drop legacyBehavior)
- delete dead v1 primitives (AdminPageHeader, AdminEmptyState)
- fix drift: suspensions space-y-8 to 6, settings section headings to
  text-sm font-medium

Fase 2 of admin/member design-system alignment. Build verified."

name:
$script = @'
export PGPASSWORD='QDmuMYWARA6TwXxOisdLWRQcdFMbbwT4'
PSQL="psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U ruangtato -d ruangtato -tA"
echo "TABLES:"; $PSQL -c "SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public';"
echo "--- row counts ---"
for t in user studios payments subscriptions leads account session invoices roles audit_logs; do
  c=$($PSQL -c "SELECT count(*) FROM \"$t\";" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$t = $c"
done
echo "--- super_admin check ---"
$PSQL -c "SELECT email, platform_role, status FROM \"user\" WHERE platform_role IS NOT NULL;"
'@
$b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($script))
ssh -i "$env:USERPROFILE\.ssh\ruangtato_vps" tato@187.77.147.156 "echo $b64 | base64 -d | bash"

name:
$script = @'
cd ~/ruangtato
echo "--- output config ---"
grep -E "output" next.config.* 2>/dev/null
echo "--- standalone server exists? ---"
ls -la .next/standalone/server.js 2>/dev/null || echo "NO standalone/server.js"
echo "--- static + public present in standalone? ---"
ls .next/standalone/.next/static >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "static: linked-in-build? checking" 
ls -d .next/standalone/.next 2>/dev/null && echo ".next dir in standalone exists"
echo "--- curl port 3000 ---"
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/health || echo "curl failed"
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/health | head -c 300
'@

ssh -i "$env:USERPROFILE\.ssh\ruangtato_vps" tato@187.77.147.156 "echo $b64 | base64 -d | bash"

name:
$script = @'
echo "=== nginx config files ==="
ls -la /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ 2>/dev/null
echo "=== ruangtato config installed? ==="
test -f /etc/nginx/sites-available/ruangtato && echo "YES installed" || echo "NOT installed (still in ~)"
test -f ~/ruangtato.nginx.conf && echo "still in home: yes" || echo "moved out of home"
echo "=== nginx running? ==="
systemctl is-active nginx
echo "=== DNS resolution of ruangtato.com (from VPS) ==="
getent hosts ruangtato.com || echo "no A record resolving yet"
echo "=== pm2 app still online ==="
pm2 pid ruangtato 2>/dev/null && echo "online" || echo "check pm2"
'@
$b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($script))
ssh -i "$env:USERPROFILE\.ssh\ruangtato_vps" tato@187.77.147.156 "echo $b64 | base64 -d | bash"
